Wide spread and uncertainty in long-term Fed policy outlook

notes: Current macro environment suggests persistent inflationary pressures, though GDP growth may be slowing. Fed policy remains a key uncertainty, with markets pricing in rate cuts but inflation data could delay dovish pivots. Weather markets offer shorter-term opportunities with clearer historical grounding.
